lead.reason: Gemini CLI has no verified lead subagent dispatch path in this harness.

analyst.reason: Gemini CLI can run analyst/research prompts in the primary session using synced instructions.

architect.reason: Gemini CLI has no verified architect subagent dispatch path for chain-critical spec gates.

dev.reason: Gemini CLI tool denial history makes dev dispatch unsafe without a provider-specific proof gate.

qa.reason: Gemini CLI can run bounded QA review prompts in the primary session.

docs.reason: Gemini CLI can perform documentation updates when tools are available in the primary session.

maintainer.reason: Gemini CLI has no verified maintainer closeout dispatch path with reliable artifact writes.

designer.reason: Gemini CLI has no verified designer role dispatch path in this harness.

notes: Provider adapter only; scheduled/background work must enqueue tickets instead of launching this command directly.
